_meta.warning: 채점 정답 키 — 피평가자 노출 금지. G2 provisional — restatement/non-reliance, NOT fraud.

candidates.scheme_summary: 8-K Item 4.02 (2026-02-05): purchased transportation costs ~$77M understated / unrecorded accounts payable; FY2023-24 10-Ks characterized as materially misstated; CFO and COO terminated. G2 PROVISIONAL (non-reliance/restatement event, NOT confirmed fraud).

8-K Item 4.02 (2026-02-20): whistleblower-triggered; meat-processing plant inventory overstated up to ~$22M cumulative (FY2022-2025). G2 PROVISIONAL (non-reliance/restatement event, NOT confirmed fraud).

8-K Item 4.02 (2026-03-12): captive-insurance subsidiary liability accounting error; FY2023-24 and prior quarters restated. G2 PROVISIONAL (non-reliance/restatement event, error-like, NOT confirmed fraud).
